title: Delete
description: Remove files safely while preserving user work. Use before rm, unlink, fs.rm, generated artifact pruning, manifest uninstall, cache cleanup, or any operation that removes paths.
body: Deletion starts after ownership and intent are explicit. Inspect git status, manifests, generated markers, and target paths first. Delete named owned paths. User-authored, dirty, ambiguous, outside-root, or broader-than-requested paths move to a blocker with evidence.
